creator: nagy.attila@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

This patch should fix it:

--- dovecot2-pigeonhole.orig/Makefile   2011-06-07 08:25:31.476280000 +0200
+++ dovecot2-pigeonhole/Makefile        2011-06-07 08:38:09.425921731 +0200
@@ -49,6 +49,11 @@
                 ' ${WRKSRC}/doc/Makefile.in
         @${LN} -f ${WRKSRC}/doc/spamtest-virustest.txt ${WRKSRC}/

+do-install:
+.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+       @${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+.endif
+
  post-install:
  .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
         ${INSTALL} ${_SHROWNGRP} -m ${BINMODE} -d ${DOCSDIR}


On 06/02/11 21:38, Sylvio César Teixeira Amorim wrote:
> Error in install of dovecot2-pigeonhole
>
> See
>
> http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/dovecot-pigeonhole-0.2.3.log
